prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约6301→6674→6175→5326→9919名。2021–2024年位次在5300–6700名区间窄幅波动，2025年因专业组拆分、最低分专业组（烟台研究院相关专业）位次大幅后移至9919名，属结构性变化而非整体热度下降；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为73人，2024年65人，2025年74人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划77人，较2025年增加3人（扩招约4%），扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国农业大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，反映综合实力和声誉持续增强；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；2025年声誉文件无该校负面记录；抖音热度排名第13（高热），食堂特色获大量正面曝光，整体关注度较高。历史投档异常方面，2024年出现高关注度投档线暴跌信号，对2025年报考心理有滞后影响；第五轮学科评估中，作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，共7个A-及以上学科，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学持续偏热；农林类相关专业（如动物医学、食品科学）受益于学校学科优势，报考热度平稳。广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，较2025年增加约1.2万人；物理类考生估算约26.4万人，较2025年增加约1.4%，竞争略有加剧。；中国农业大学位于北京，对广西考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在广西招生占比约2.5%（2025年物理类74人/全国约3000人），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因专业组拆分大幅后移的结构性变化、2026年小幅扩招（+4%）及本省物理类考生小幅增加（+1.4%），预计2026年最低位次较2025年异常值略有回升（位次数字减小），但不会回到2024年水平。预测最低位次约10000名，区间9500–10500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 6301 → 6674 → 6175 → 5326 → 9919. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 5300 and 6700 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to the splitting of major groups, the minimum ranking for the lowest-scoring major group (Yantai Research Institute related majors) significantly dropped to 9919, a structural change rather than a decline in overall popularity. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 73 students from 2021 to 2023, 65 in 2024, 74 in 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan file shows 77 students, an increase of 3 (about 4%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 29th in 2022 → 30th in 2023 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission cutoff line. The 2025 reputation file has no negative records for this university. Douyin popularity ranking is 13th (high heat), with positive exposure from cafeteria features, overall high attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, a high-attention signal of a sharp drop in the admission cutoff line appeared in 2024, which has a lagging effect on the 2025 application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above. The university's agricultural and forestry disciplines are top-notch nationally, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with high social heat. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be relatively hot. Agricultural and forestry-related majors (e.g., Animal Medicine, Food Science) benefit from the university's disciplinary advantages, with stable application heat. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025; Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 264,000, an increase of about 1.4% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Guangxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.5% (74 Physics Category students in 2025 out of about 3,000 nationwide), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural change in 2025 rankings due to major group splitting, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4%), and the slight increase in local Physics Category examinees (+1.4%), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly recover from the 2025 anomaly (ranking number decreases), but will not return to the 2024 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10,000, with a range of 9,500 to 10,500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 9,500–10,500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Agronomy, Animal Medicine, Food Science, Electronic Information, etc., as advantageous discipline majors), use Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science, etc.) as a reach, and Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute related majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<9,500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>10,500), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 24th in 2026, with steadily improving school level and comprehensive reputation; in 2024, the reputation evaluation was significantly negative (mainly related to Physics Category enrollment issues), but History Category was not directly affected; Douyin popularity ranking 13th (high heat), with cafeteria features receiving a large amount of positive exposure, overall attention is relatively high; the school is characterized by agriculture and forestry disciplines, and the History Category enrollment majors (Sociology, Law, Communication, Business Administration, Economics, etc.) are not the school's core advantageous disciplines, but rely on the 985 platform with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social popularity is relatively hot (recommended), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 128,000, an increase of about 8,600 compared to 2025 (+7.2%), intensifying competition; but the expansion rate (+9.5%) is slightly larger than the examinee growth rate, so overall competitive pressure is slightly eased. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to History Category examinees in Guangxi; the school's History Category enrollment in Guangxi accounts for about 1.5% (21 students in 2025 / about 1,400 nationwide), which is a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the stable and slightly rising trend of the 2025 ranking, the significant expansion in 2026 (+9.5%), and the increase in History Category examinees in the province (+7.2%), the expansion rate is slightly larger than the examinee growth rate, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025 (ranking number slightly larger). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2000, with a range of 1700–2300.
